behaviors.description: Speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so summaries can attribute statements to attendees.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP applies because this behavior depends on real speech-to-text model output quality (speaker diarization/label preservation), which a stub would mask. REAL-INFRA may exist (HTTP), but the primary failure boundary is model output correctness, so Agentic is the minimum. Rejected Integration because behavior text says "speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels" (output-content quality, not only wiring). Rejected Workflow because this behavior targets one model stage, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run real meeting audio through the real speech-to-text API and assert speaker labels are preserved and mapped to utterances correctly enough for downstream attendee attribution.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS indicates this is parsing logic over transcript text and structure extraction, which can fail entirely within one local parser/function boundary. No required OS/network/subprocess and no model-output dependence for this behavior itself. Rejected Integration because behavior text focuses on "parsing extracts" (local transformation), not cross-module state handoff.
behaviors.test_description: Feed representative transcript snippets into the parser and assert extracted records contain correct assignee and task text fields in the summary-input schema.

behaviors.description: Live summary contains at least one action item for every attendee assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM summarization decisions (coverage of assignees/action items). A deterministic mock summary can always satisfy the assertion and hide real misses. Rejected Integration because behavior text targets output quality in "live summary output," not just routing/retry scaffolding. Rejected Workflow because this is a single summary-quality check, not inherently multiple agentic decisions chained.
behaviors.test_description: Use real transcript content with known assignments, call the real summarization model, and assert each assigned attendee appears with at least one action item in output.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` schema section, not generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly scopes to routing logic after decisions are identified; that is deterministic mapping logic at a local boundary. No real infra or model-quality dependency is required to expose this failure. Rejected Integration because wording is "logic routes identified decisions," which disqualifies needing module handoff to reproduce core bug.
behaviors.test_description: Given already-identified decision objects, assert mapper/formatter places them under `decisions` and not narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key decisions in transcript appear in summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: This is model output quality/placement behavior: the summarizer must recognize and place decisions correctly. Mocked outputs would hide failure. Rejected Integration because behavior text checks semantic inclusion/placement in "live summary," which depends on real model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Run real or realistic transcript text through the real summarization model and verify known key decisions are present in the `decisions` section and absent from narrative-only placement.

behaviors.description: For audio longer than 60 minutes, service splits into segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: MULTI-STEP applies: this behavior requires sequential multi-segment processing and merge across repeated model calls, with correctness depending on cross-step agentic outcomes and handoff. Integration is too low because stubs can validate split/merge mechanics but not real multi-step summary coherence. Rejected Agentic (single-step) because behavior text explicitly requires segmented sequential processing plus merge (multiple agentic stages).
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through end-to-end segmented processing, verify segment order/coverage, and assert merged final summary remains coherent and structurally complete.

behaviors.description: Full pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end pipeline with multiple dependent stages, including agentic model steps (transcription + summarization) and real I/O boundaries. MULTI-STEP + LLM-DEP clearly push to Workflow. Rejected System because although real infra is required, behavior text spans multiple agentic steps in sequence (higher boundary).
behaviors.test_description: Execute full production-like run on a real meeting file: upload, real transcription call, real summary generation, and verify final structured output is delivered without manual intervention.
